subject: Re:
body:
you should try to find a package deal,, hotel plus airfare.. don't worry about money


----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, March 15, 2007 4:52:21 PM
Subject: 


Hey!
  Oh, Simona and I are so excited about our trip. So my flight is at 10:30pm on Thursday the 22nd and I will return April 1st. We will be staying in Madrid for 4 nights but I still need to find a hotel.  I've been looking for hotels in the center of Madrid but they are 120 euro a night and up... is 120 to 130 euros too much? I'm extremely grateful for this trip...thank you so much JE!
         Dana B
